description_long: This cafe features a low, rectangular facade with a warm ochre exterior and vertical wooden slats flanking a central recessed service window. The front area includes a wooden bench, a small potted plant, and a white trash bin, suggesting a welcoming and functional outdoor space. The service window is framed in teal, with glass display cases and shelving visible, likely for food or drink items. The structure appears to be single-story, with a flat roof and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing clean lines and practical design. The rear and side views show a solid, unadorned wall, indicating the main interaction occurs at the front. The overall aesthetic is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban sidewalks or plazas.
description: A modern, single-story cafe with a warm ochre facade, central service window, and outdoor bench seating, accented by a potted plant and trash bin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service window, wooden bench, trash bin, potted plant, and vertical slat details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the facade and the protruding service window area, with the potted plant partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid ochre wall with no windows or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bench and trash bin, with the service window area slightly visible.
